channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Bruce Springsteen Performs ‘Streets of Minneapolis’ at No Kings Rally
item.description: 🎶 The Boss brings the heat at No Kings Rally with 'Streets of Minneapolis'! 🔥 Rock on, Bruce! #BruceSpringsteen #NoKingsRally 🎸

item.title: Barbie Dream Fest Is the New Willy Wonka Experience
item.description: Step into a world of pure imagination at Barbie Dream Fest! 🌟🎶 Let the music magic take you on a sweet adventure! 🍭 #BarbieDreamFest

item.title: Chvrches Debut New Song “Conman” At Robert Smith’s Teenage Cancer Trust Benefit
item.description: Chvrches rocked the stage with their killer new track “Conman” at the Teenage Cancer Trust Benefit! 🎶✨ #Chvrches #NewMusic

item.title: Snapped: ILLENIUM’s ODYSSEY Comes to Life at Sphere Las Vegas (A Photo Essay)
item.description: Step into ILLENIUM's magical world at Sphere Las Vegas 🌟 Check out the epic photo essay capturing the ODYSSEY experience! 📸✨ #ILLENIUM #SphereLasVegas

item.title: Weezer Play Pop-Up Rooftop Gig to Mark ‘The Gathering’ Tour
item.description: Rooftop rockin' with Weezer! 🎸 Who's joining 'The Gathering' tour party? Time to hit those high notes! 🎶 #Weezer #TheGathering
